Notice And Application For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT.

APPEARANCES: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. 922-5939 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO DESCRIBE THE PROPERTY CLAIMED TO BE EXEMPT. CCP SECTION 484.350(b)(1). Order signed in open court. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

Notice And Application For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Continued To Sep-02-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND WRIT OF ATTACHMENT is continued to September 2, 2010. Opposing party to provide a courtesy copy to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

Notice And Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted as to Joey And Eddie's, LLC. The motion is denied as to Edward N. Maiello as judgment has been set aside as to that defendant. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Joey And Eddie's, LLC's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant Joey And Eddie's, LLC is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Joey And Eddie's, LLC in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Ntc And Motion To Set Aside Default Pursuant To Ccp 473.5
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT EDWARD MAIELLO Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment Pursuant To CCP 473.5. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to set aside default and default judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/EHG) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.
